seed_data.title: Banana Bright Face Primer

recall.retrieval_summary: It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup.
recall.retrieval_body:
It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup. Meet Banana Bright Face Primer, the vitamin C-powered illuminating makeup primer that delivers instant radiance while improving and extending makeup wear. With its hydrating, vitamin C-infused formula, Banana Bright isn't just a makeup prep must-have, it's a moisturizing vegan makeup primer with skincare benefits. In fact, this brightening primer imparts the complexion with a smooth, soft-focus effect while minimizing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. Inspired by the makeup artist must-have - "banana powder" - this subtly sunny makeup primer contains brightening pigments to bring radiance to the entire complexion. Whether it's worn under makeup, mixed in with foundation, or even worn alone, Banana Bright Face Primer creates a dewy, healthy-looking glow.

A vitamin C enriched makeup primer that improves and extends makeup wear, blurs pores and blemishes, hydrates and instantly brightens.

snapshot.title: Banana Bright Face Primer

variants.description: A vitamin C enriched makeup primer that improves and extends makeup wear, blurs pores and blemishes, hydrates and instantly brightens.
variants.title: 1 oz

snapshot.inci_list:
This product does not contain parabens, sulfates or phthalates

Vitamin C 

- Ole’s “gold standard” for addressing visible signs of aging

Banana Powder-Inspired Pigments 

- Naturally derived light-reflecting minerals that instantly illuminate your complexion

- Inspired by banana powder, a makeup artist must-have for brightening

Vitamin E 

- Antioxidant that helps nourish & condition skin

- Helps stabilize the vitamin C in the formula

Full Ingredients List: 
Aqua/Water/Eau, Squalane, Dimethicone, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Isododecane, Polymethylsilsesquioxane, Mica, Coconut Alkanes, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Sclerocarya Birrea Seed Oil, Dilinoleic Acid/Propanediol Copolymer, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Cetearyl Methicone, Silica, Phenoxyethanol, Cetearyl Glucoside, Xylitylglucoside, Dimethicone/Vinyltrimethylsiloxysilicate Crosspolymer, Anhydroxylitol, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Potassium Cetyl Phosphate, Stevioside, Polysilicone-11, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Xylitol, Tocopherol, Parfum/Fragrance, Potassium Azeloyl Diglycinate, Iron Oxides (Ci 77491), Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Glucose, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Citrate, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Fruit Extract, Citrus Limon (Lemon) Fruit Extract, Hippophae Rhamnoides Extract, Lycium Barbarum Fruit Extract, Rosa Canina Fruit Extract, Sodium Hydroxide, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Polysorbate 60, Sorbitan Isostearate, Ascorbic Acid, Aroma/Flavor, Sodium Chloride, Citral, Limonene, Linalool.

snapshot.pdp_how_to_use_raw: Can be worn alone, under makeup or dabbed on top of makeup as a highlight. For external use only. Use as directed. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately. Precautions: Do not use if allergic to vitamin C or any other ingredient in this formula. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.
snapshot.pdp_description_raw:
It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup.
Meet Banana Bright Face Primer, the vitamin C-powered illuminating makeup primer that delivers instant radiance while improving and extending makeup wear. With its hydrating, vitamin C-infused formula, Banana Bright isn't just a makeup prep must-have, it's a moisturizing vegan makeup primer with skincare benefits. In fact, this brightening primer imparts the complexion with a smooth, soft-focus effect while minimizing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.

Inspired by the makeup artist must-have - "banana powder" - this subtly sunny makeup primer contains brightening pigments to bring radiance to the entire complexion. Whether it's worn under makeup, mixed in with foundation, or even worn alone, Banana Bright Face Primer creates a dewy, healthy-looking glow.

pdp_details_sections.heading: Details
pdp_details_sections.body:
It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup.
Meet Banana Bright Face Primer, the vitamin C-powered illuminating makeup primer that delivers instant radiance while improving and extending makeup wear. With its hydrating, vitamin C-infused formula, Banana Bright isn't just a makeup prep must-have, it's a moisturizing vegan makeup primer with skincare benefits. In fact, this brightening primer imparts the complexion with a smooth, soft-focus effect while minimizing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.

Inspired by the makeup artist must-have - "banana powder" - this subtly sunny makeup primer contains brightening pigments to bring radiance to the entire complexion. Whether it's worn under makeup, mixed in with foundation, or even worn alone, Banana Bright Face Primer creates a dewy, healthy-looking glow.

pdp_details_sections.heading: How to Use
pdp_details_sections.body: Can be worn alone, under makeup or dabbed on top of makeup as a highlight. For external use only. Use as directed. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately. Precautions: Do not use if allergic to vitamin C or any other ingredient in this formula. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.

With its hydrating, vitamin C-infused formula, Banana Bright isn't just a makeup prep must-have, it's a moisturizing vegan makeup primer with skincare benefits. In fact, this brightening primer imparts the complexion with a smooth, soft-focus effect while minimizing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.

Inspired by the makeup artist must-have - "banana powder" - this subtly sunny makeup primer contains brightening pigments to bring radiance to the entire complexion. Whether it's worn under makeup, mixed in with foundation, or even worn alone, Banana Bright Face Primer creates a dewy, healthy-looking glow.

Vitamin C 

- Ole’s “gold standard” for addressing visible signs of aging

Banana Powder-Inspired Pigments

description_raw.value: A vitamin C enriched makeup primer that improves and extends makeup wear, blurs pores and blemishes, hydrates and instantly brightens.

value.heading: Details
value.body:
It starts with skin. Get hydrated, bright and well-prepped skin for luminous, lasting makeup.

Meet Banana Bright Face Primer, the vitamin C-powered illuminating makeup primer that delivers instant radiance while improving and extending makeup wear. With its hydrating, vitamin C-infused formula, Banana Bright isn't just a makeup prep must-have, it's a moisturizing vegan makeup primer with skincare benefits. In fact, this brightening primer imparts the complexion with a smooth, soft-focus effect while minimizing the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines.

Inspired by the makeup artist must-have - "banana powder" - this subtly sunny makeup primer contains brightening pigments to bring radiance to the entire complexion. Whether it's worn under makeup, mixed in with foundation, or even worn alone, Banana Bright Face Primer creates a dewy, healthy-looking glow.

The Experience

This silky, hydrating primer glides softly over skin and features a delightful creamy orange aroma.

Benefits & Clinicals*
Hydrates
Improves & extends makeup wear
Makes foundation look fresh longer
Clean, vegan & cruelty-free
97% agree it instantly brightens dull skin
91% agree it blurs pores & blemishes
94% agree it improves the look of makeup**

*In a clinical study of 35 people, immediately after application
**In a clinical study of 35 people, after 8 hours

value.heading: How to Use
value.body: Can be worn alone, under makeup or dabbed on top of makeup as a highlight. For external use only. Use as directed. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately. Precautions: Do not use if allergic to vitamin C or any other ingredient in this formula. If irritation occurs, discontinue use.
